title: Draft example: shipping with an approval-first writing workflow
excerpt: A draft placeholder showing how future posts can be written early, approved deliberately, and published later without exposing unfinished work.
approvalNotes: Waiting for final review. Tighten the intro and confirm the publish date before approval.
recruiterSignal: Thinks about process, not just code
Keeps public output clean and intentional
summary: This draft is intentionally hidden from the public site until Marco explicitly approves it and its scheduled publish time arrives.

sections.heading: Why this exists
content: This file is a working example of the blog workflow. Drafts live in the repo, but they do not appear on the public portfolio until they are approved.

sections.heading: Before approval
bullets: Polish the title and opening summary
